_meta.description: Storm descent schedule. Storm consumes one region every ~3.5 min. No Sudden Death. Anyone not in Core Hollow by 17:30 dies. Timings LOCKED; damage values TBD.
_meta._balanced: 2026-07-05 first-pass balance pass — testable values pending playtesting
_meta._balance_note: Per-phase damage_per_second is an escalating curve: ignorable in Atmosphere (0.5), ramping ~2x-2.5x each phase, LETHAL in Core Hollow (45.0 dps kills a full-HP 100 player in ~2.2s). NOTE: the live StormSystem currently reads a single flat storm_dps from world_config.json (set to 12.0); this per-phase curve is the intended escalation for WHEN StormSystem is upgraded to read per-phase damage. No .gd was modified to wire this — intent recorded only.
